title: The Forgotten Return
description: Pages 17–18 focus on the forgotten return, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Sugar, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Trebol, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as usopp's desperate scream causes Sugar to faint, turning Dressrosa's toys back into people and shattering Doflamingo's hidden order.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's just a one-legged toy, for crying out loud!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sugar
dialogue.text: Normally... when people are turned into toys, they are given a con- tract...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: forced to become obedient workers who cannot disobey their orders...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But in the case of our captain, the first toy who was ever created in this country...

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: Sugar made a mistake... she forgot to impose a contract on him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That single mistake, ten long years ago, created the captain you see today!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He is the only toy who is able to rebel against the Donquixote family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That is why he has fought against them on his own for ten whole years!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The second report is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If it weren't for him, all of the other toys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...would have had no choice but to succumb to their cruel fate!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: And we of the Tontatta, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...would all have been turned into slaves without ever realising what was really happening!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If we do not respond to his cries...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...this country will truly be beyond saving!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That man is worth placing all our hopes in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Though nobody remembers him now, there was a time when everyone knew his name!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: when he was a big human, the name of that man was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: "Kyros"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The greatest gladiator who ever fought in the colos- Seum!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: That is the captain we follow!!!

summary: The Forgotten Return focuses on Unknown person #1, Sugar, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Trebol, Unknown person #4 as usopp's desperate scream causes Sugar to faint, turning Dressrosa's toys back into people and shattering Doflamingo's hidden order.
